inputs.rowSource: motion-trace-alignment.csv rows joined to trace.csv by traceSequence

runtimeOnlyCorrection.featureVector: replaced future/reference target distance / 8 with runtimeTargetDisplacementEstimate / 8; replaced future/reference target speed / 3000 with runtime v2 speed / 3000
runtimeOnlyCorrection.runtimeTargetDisplacementEstimate: max(0, horizonMs / 1000) * v2 speed from current/past samples
runtimeOnlyCorrection.runtimeGuard: does not read EventWindowLabel, StaticLabel, MovementPhase, generated velocity/phase, or future target distance

training.capBehavior: full train split used for every seed

specs.TrainingTarget: event-safe target; post-stop and stationary labels pull to zero displacement; runtime-only feature vector; full train split multi-seed validation
specs.RuntimeShape: one hidden tanh MLP, hidden=32, runtime-only temporal features, CPU multi-seed focused validation

RuntimeCost.guard: runtime-only per-scenario stop latch, static zero target, cap, and lead-side clamp

conclusionHints.deploymentGate: Held-out test normal visual p95/p99 must not regress; held-out test normal-moving futureLag p95 must be within 0.05 px or 5% relative of product and p99 within 0.10 px or 5% relative; robustness peakLead/OTR/returnMotion, futureLead p99, and held-out stationary jitter must not regress.
